title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 351.1210 - Claims against dissolved cooperative, former officers, directors, and members may defend
text:
351.1210.  Claims against dissolved cooperative, former officers, directors, and members may defend. — After a cooperative has been dissolved, any of its former officers, directors, or members may assert or defend, in the name of the cooperative, a claim by or against the cooperative.
(L. 2011 S.B. 366)
